policy: Unsupported analyzer outputs are listed only; no placeholder media, keypoints, depth maps, or inferred values were generated.

layers.reason: OpenPose/BODY_25 model and runtime are not installed or available in this workflow
MiDaS/ZoeDepth/DPT or equivalent depth model is not installed or available
Normals require a valid depth/geometry layer
No segmentation or pose-derived subject mask model is available
layers.effect: Camera measurement is whole-frame apparent motion, not background-only camera motion.
